channel.title: ProbBrain - AI News Terminal
channel.description: AI lab announcements, arXiv papers, GitHub and HuggingFace trending, AI Hacker News, and independent writers - aggregated, deduped, and posted to @ProbBrain on Telegram.

item.title: [GitHub Trending] sponsors/Leonxlnx — Taste-Skill - gives your AI good taste. stops the AI from generating boring, generic slop
item.description: Taste-Skill is a new tool designed to enhance AI output quality and prevent generic generation.

item.title: [GitHub Trending] sponsors/hesreallyhim — A hand-picked collection of the finest of resources for the most awesome of agents, Claude Code, the undisputed champion of coding companions, from the unstoppable team at Anthropic PBC. A delectable showcase of top tier skills, ambidextrous agents, scintillating status lines, top notch developer tooling, and also we have plugins
item.description: GitHub repository offers curated resources for Claude Code including skills, agents, tooling, and plugins.

item.title: [GitHub Trending] sponsors/coreyhaines31 — Marketing skills for Claude Code and AI agents. CRO, copywriting, SEO, analytics, and growth engineering.
item.description: Sponsor offers marketing expertise including CRO, copywriting, SEO, analytics, and growth engineering for Claude Code and AI agents.

item.title: [GitHub Trending] facebook/astryx — An open source design system that's fully customizable and agent ready
item.description: Facebook releases Astryx, an open-source design system with customization and AI agent integration.

item.title: [GitHub Trending] gastownhall/gastown — Gas Town - multi-agent workspace manager
item.description: Gas Town is a multi-agent workspace manager project trending on GitHub.

item.title: [GitHub Trending] sponsors/OthmanAdi — Persistent file-based planning for AI coding agents and long-running agentic tasks. Crash-proof markdown plans that survive context loss and /clear, plus a deterministic completion gate and multi-agent shared state on disk. Manus-style. Works with Claude Code, Codex CLI, Cursor, Kiro, OpenCode and 60+ agents via the SKILL.md standard.
item.description: Persistent file-based planning system for AI coding agents that survives crashes and context loss.

item.title: [GitHub Trending] sponsors/steipete — Show usage stats for OpenAI Codex and Claude Code, without having to login.
item.description: Tool shows OpenAI Codex and Claude Code usage statistics without login requirements.

item.title: [Simon Willison] sqlite-utils 4.0rc2, mostly written by Claude Fable (for about $149.25)
item.description: sqlite-utils 4.0rc2, mostly written by Claude Fable (for about $149.25)

item.title: [Hacker News] Scientists reverse brain aging, with a nasal spray
item.description: Scientists reverse brain aging, with a nasal spray

item.title: [Hacker News] GPT-5.5 Codex reasoning-token clustering may be leading to degraded performance
item.description: GPT-5.5 Codex reasoning-token clustering may be leading to degraded performance

item.title: [Hacker News] No more than 100 000 faint satellites should orbit Earth
item.description: No more than 100 000 faint satellites should orbit Earth

item.title: [GitHub Trending] sponsors/ogulcancelik — agent multiplexer that lives in your terminal.
item.description: GitHub trending project: terminal-based agent multiplexer tool.

item.title: [GitHub Trending] alibaba/page-agent — JavaScript in-page GUI agent. Control web interfaces with natural language.
item.description: Alibaba releases page-agent, a JavaScript agent for controlling web interfaces using natural language.

item.title: [GitHub Trending] sponsors/Zackriya-Solutions — Privacy first, AI meeting assistant with 4x faster Parakeet/Whisper live transcription, speaker diarization, and Ollama summarization built on Rust. 100% local processing. no cloud required. Meetily (Meetly Ai - https://meetily.ai) is the #1 Self-hosted, Open-source Ai meeting note taker for macOS & Windows.
item.description: Meetily is a self-hosted, open-source AI meeting assistant offering local transcription, speaker diarization, and summarization for macOS and Windows.

item.title: [GitHub Trending] sponsors/asgeirtj — Extracted system prompts from Anthropic - Claude Fable 5, Opus 4.8, Claude Code, Claude Design. OpenAI - ChatGPT 5.5 Thinking, GPT 5.5 Instant, Codex. Google - Gemini 3.5 Flash, 3.1 Pro, Antigravity. xAI - Grok, Cursor, Copilot, VS Code, Perplexity, and more. Updated regularly.
item.description: Repository collects extracted system prompts from Anthropic, OpenAI, Google, xAI, and other AI providers, regularly updated.

item.title: [GitHub Trending] dotnet/skills — Repository for skills to assist AI coding agents with .NET and C#
item.description: Repository provides skills for AI coding agents to work with .NET and C#.

item.title: [GitHub Trending] sponsors/mattpocock — Skills for Real Engineers. Straight from my .claude directory.
item.description: GitHub user mattpocock shares engineering skills content from their .claude directory.

item.title: [GitHub Trending] sponsors/CoplayDev — Unity MCP acts as a bridge between AI assistants and your Unity Editor. Give your LLM tools to manage assets, control scenes, edit scripts, and automate tasks within Unity.
item.description: Unity MCP enables AI assistants to manage assets, control scenes, edit scripts, and automate tasks within the Unity Editor.

item.title: [GitHub Trending] alirezarezvani/claude-skills — 337 Claude Code skills & agent skills & plugins (30+ Agents, 70+ custom commands, 330+ skills, customizable references, scripts)for Claude Code, Codex, Gemini CLI, Cursor, and 8 more coding agents — engineering, marketing, product, compliance, C-level advisory, research, business operations, commercial & finance, and your daily productivity skills.
item.description: GitHub repository provides 337 skills and plugins for multiple AI coding agents including Claude Code and Cursor.

item.title: [GitHub Trending] crynta/terax-ai — Lightweight (7MB) Terminal-first AI-native dev workspace
item.description: Terax-ai provides a lightweight 7MB terminal-first workspace for AI-native development.

item.title: [Hacker News] The bottleneck might be the air in the room
item.description: The bottleneck might be the air in the room

item.title: [Hacker News] Agentic coding notes from Galapagos Island
item.description: Agentic coding notes from Galapagos Island

item.title: [Hacker News] MSI Center – How to gain SYSTEM privileges in seconds
item.description: MSI Center – How to gain SYSTEM privileges in seconds

item.title: [Simon Willison] Open Source AI Gap Map
item.description: Open Source AI Gap Map

item.title: [Hacker News] New serious vulnerabilities spiked around release of Claude Mythos Preview
item.description: New serious vulnerabilities spiked around release of Claude Mythos Preview

item.title: [Hacker News] Espionage Against the European Parliament
item.description: Espionage Against the European Parliament

item.title: [Hacker News] I Wasn't Allowed Prompting ChatGPT During My Chalk Talk: This Is Discrimination (2025)
item.description: I Wasn't Allowed Prompting ChatGPT During My Chalk Talk: This Is Discrimination (2025)

item.title: [Hacker News] Claude, please stop trying to memorize random crap
item.description: Claude, please stop trying to memorize random crap

item.title: [Hacker News] Jamesob's guide to running SOTA LLMs locally
item.description: Jamesob's guide to running SOTA LLMs locally

item.title: [Google DeepMind] Google DeepMind and A24 announce first-of-its-kind research partnership
item.description: Google DeepMind and A24 announce first-of-its-kind research partnership

item.title: [Hacker News] Please stop the AI confidence theater
item.description: Please stop the AI confidence theater

item.title: [GitHub Trending] usestrix/strix — Open-source AI penetration testing tool to find and fix your app’s vulnerabilities.
item.description: Strix is an open-source AI tool for automated penetration testing and vulnerability detection in applications.

item.title: [GitHub Trending] ansible/ansible — Ansible is a radically simple IT automation platform that makes your applications and systems easier to deploy and maintain. Automate everything from code deployment to network configuration to cloud management, in a language that approaches plain English, using SSH, with no agents to install on remote systems. https://docs.ansible.com.
item.description: Ansible is an agentless IT automation platform that uses SSH and plain English-like syntax for infrastructure management.

item.title: [GitHub Trending] sponsors/safishamsi — AI coding assistant skill (Claude Code, Codex, OpenCode, Cursor, Gemini CLI, and more). Turn any folder of code, SQL schemas, R scripts, shell scripts, docs, papers, images, or videos into a queryable knowledge graph. App code + database schema + infrastructure in one graph.
item.description: Tool converts code folders, databases, scripts, docs, and media into queryable knowledge graphs for AI coding assistants.

item.title: [GitHub Trending] anthropics/claude-code — Claude Code is an agentic coding tool that lives in your terminal, understands your codebase, and helps you code faster by executing routine tasks, explaining complex code, and handling git workflows - all through natural language commands.
item.description: Claude Code is a terminal-based AI coding assistant that automates tasks, explains code, and manages Git workflows using natural language.

item.title: [GitHub Trending] sponsors/supabase — The Postgres development platform. Supabase gives you a dedicated Postgres database to build your web, mobile, and AI applications.
item.description: Supabase provides dedicated Postgres databases for web, mobile, and AI application development.

item.title: [Anthropic] Claude's extended thinking
item.description: Claude's extended thinking

item.title: [Anthropic] Announcing Anthropic's Responsible Scaling Policy
item.description: Announcing Anthropic's Responsible Scaling Policy

item.title: [Hacker News] Alibaba to ban Claude Code in workplace over alleged backdoor risks, source says
item.description: Alibaba to ban Claude Code in workplace over alleged backdoor risks, source says

item.title: [Hacker News] Ask HN: Is anyone experimenting with different ways of using LLMs for coding?
item.description: Ask HN: Is anyone experimenting with different ways of using LLMs for coding?

item.title: [Latent Space] AIEWF Daily Dispatch: The great loops debate and the state of AI engineering
item.description: AIEWF Daily Dispatch: The great loops debate and the state of AI engineering

item.title: [arXiv cs.CL] TokenScope: Token-Level Explainability and Interpretability for Code-Oriented Tasks in Large Language Models
item.description: TokenScope is an interactive tool for token-level explainability in LLM code generation, providing attention patterns, code analysis, and counterfactual exploration.

item.title: [arXiv cs.CL] Safeguarding LLM Agents from Misalignment through Provenance Analysis
item.description: ProvenanceGuard, a provenance-analysis framework, reduces LLM agent tool-invocation errors from 42.9% to 1.8% by detecting misalignment with user intent.

item.title: [arXiv cs.CL] Kara: Efficient Reasoning LLM Serving via Sliding-Window KV Cache Compression
item.description: Kara is a sliding-window KV cache compression technique that selectively removes unimportant token pairs to reduce memory and improve throughput for reasoning LLMs.

item.title: [arXiv cs.CL] SPARCLE: SPeaker-aware Aligned Representations via Contrastive Language Embeddings
item.description: SPARCLE, a speaker-conditioned grapheme model trained with contrastive learning, halves word error rates in low-resource speech synthesis.

item.title: [arXiv cs.CL] Breaking Safety at the Token Boundary: How BPE Tokenization Creates Exploitable Gaps in LLM Alignment
item.description: Character-level perturbations bypass LLM safety by exploiting BPE tokenization's fragmentation of safety-critical words, which are absent from alignment training data.

item.title: [arXiv cs.CL] Prompt Framing Distorts Count-Based Evaluation of LLM Error Detection: Evidence from Numeric Anchoring
item.description: Prompt framing artificially inflates count-based F1 scores for LLM error detection without improving span localization accuracy.

item.title: [arXiv cs.CL] Mapping Text to Multiplex Graph: Prompt Compression as L\'evy Walk-Guided Graph Pruning
item.description: Prompt compression method RAGP models text as multiplex graphs with Levy walk-guided pruning, exceeding performance of existing LLM-based methods.

item.title: [arXiv cs.CL] Office Comprehension Benchmark
item.description: New benchmark Office Comprehension Bench tests LLM performance on native Word, Excel, PowerPoint files, with strongest systems reaching only 59.3% on domain Q&A.

item.title: [arXiv cs.CL] RuleChef: Grounding LLM Task Knowledge in Human-Editable Rules
item.description: RuleChef is a framework using LLMs to generate and refine executable rules for NLP tasks through iterative improvement with human feedback.

item.title: [arXiv cs.CL] TurnNat: Automatic Evaluation of Turn-Taking Naturalness in Dyadic Spoken Dialogue
item.description: TurnNat automatically evaluates turn-taking naturalness in dialogue systems using causal prediction models and negative log-likelihood metrics.

item.title: [arXiv cs.CL] RusFinChain: A Russian Benchmark for Verifiable Chain-of-Thought Reasoning in Finance with Fuzzy-Aligned Evaluation
item.description: RusFinChain is the first Russian-language financial reasoning benchmark with 5,280 examples and novel metrics for evaluating chain-of-thought reasoning in LLMs.

item.title: [arXiv cs.CL] Multi-Objective Exploration and Preference Optimization via Mutual Information
item.description: Researchers propose MI-EPO, using mutual information to align language models with multiple human preferences while improving output controllability.

item.title: [arXiv cs.CL] MultAttnAttrib: Training-Free Multimodal Attribution in Long Document Question Answering
item.description: New training-free method attributes multimodal QA answers to document evidence, matching frontier model accuracy with one-seventh inference latency.

item.title: [arXiv cs.CL] IsoSci: A Benchmark of Isomorphic Cross-Domain Science Problems for Evaluating Reasoning versus Knowledge Retrieval in LLMs
item.description: ISOSCI benchmark shows 91.3% of LLM reasoning-mode gains are knowledge-dependent, not reasoning-ability improvements.

item.title: [arXiv cs.CL] FaithMed: Training LLMs For Faithful Evidence-Based Medical Reasoning
item.description: FaithMed framework trains medical LLMs using step-level process supervision to improve faithful evidence-based reasoning, achieving 9% improvement over baselines.

item.title: [arXiv cs.CL] Grounded Optimization: A Layered Engineering Framework for Reducing LLM Hallucination in Automated Personal Document Rewriting
item.description: Grounded Optimization framework reduces LLM hallucinations in resume rewriting from 2.48-5.36 per resume to 0.04-0.24 using a five-layer validation approach.

item.title: [arXiv cs.CL] Comparing Architectures for Supervised Political Scaling
item.description: Paper compares NLP approaches for political text scaling, examining joint prediction of ideological positions and classification-regression hybrids.

item.title: [arXiv cs.CL] From Monolingual to Multilingual: Evaluating Mamba for ASR in South African Languages
item.description: Mamba state space models match Conformer performance for speech recognition in South African languages while using fewer computational resources, with multilingual training improving results.

item.title: [arXiv cs.CL] Parameter Golf: What Really Works?
item.description: Parameter Golf analyzed 1,430 efficient language model submissions to identify which of 84 optimization techniques work under strict 16 MB and 10-minute constraints.
